title: Implement project-specific configuration loading
description:
Add support for loading project-specific Go configuration files (e.g., .goshconfig.go or gosh.config.go) that can be used alongside the global ~/.config/gosh/config.go. This should include:
- Project detection mechanisms
- Loading order (global first, then project overrides)
- Function and variable isolation/scoping
- Support for .env.local file loading

title: Implement output streaming for shellapi functions
description: Add support for streaming output from long-running shellapi functions instead of waiting for completion. This would enable real-time output for commands like go test -v, file tailing, or any process that produces output over time.

title: Improve Go function autocomplete and intellisense
description: Enhance the tab completion system to provide intelligent Go function completion, type hints, and function signatures in the REPL. Currently only basic tab completion for commands and file paths is implemented.
